titleStmt.title: SII 37.269: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 269. (A.R. No. B 375 of 1940-41.) Ayyavārikambāladinne, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Nandi pillar set up in front of the Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1457, Manmatha, Pushya śu. 5, Wednesday, corresponding to 1535 A.D., December 29.

Slightly damaged. It records a gift of the village Kaṁbāladinne situated in the Gaṇḍikōṭa-sīma by the donor (name lost) to Svayaṁbhū Śrī Lingachakravartī Mahādēva Goṅgaḍidēva for the merit of the king. It also states that the donor had held Gaṇḍikōṭa-sīma as amara-māgāṇi under the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaru¨rṣaṁbulu 1457 Agunēṭi
manmata saṁvatsara puṣya śu 5 bu . svasti . śrī sva
yaṁbhu śrī liṁga cakrava¨rti śrīmanmahādēva
goṁgaḍidēvara divya śrī pādapadmaṁbulaku śrī
manmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapra
tāpa śrīvīraAcutadēvamahārāyalu
gāru vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhyāsanā
rū mrājya cuṁḍaṁgā
nu pe
ṇaṁgāri taṁmu
bhayabhaktini sāṣṭāṁgadaṁḍapraṇāma mu
lusēsi sama¨rpiṁcina bhūdānadha¨rma śāsanakramameṭlaṁ
nnanu Acyutadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru māku A
maramāgāṇiki pāliṁcina gaṁḍikōṭa sīmalōni ko
me¨rla pāyaku dakṣaṇaṁ kaṁbāladiṁna grāmaṁ svā
miki Amṛtapaḷu Aṁgaraṁgabhōgālaku nityadīpā
rādhanakuṁnu tadhātidhi makara saṁkrāṁti puṇyakāla
maṁdu pinākini nadītīramaṁdu mā svāmi Acyuta
dēva mahārāyalaku puṇyaṁgānu saha hiraṁṇyō
dakadānadārāpū¨rvakaṁbugānu dhāravōsi Istimi
Āgrāmānaku yella catusīmaku lōnaina nidhi nikṣēpa jala
pāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Āgāmi sidasādhyaṁbulu Aniyeḍi A
ṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyataluṁnnu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāIgānu A
nubhaviṁcumani trivācakamugānu trikaraṇasuddigānu
dhāravōsi Iccina bhūdāna dha¨rmasāsanaṁ . svadattā
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ
paradattāpahāreṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bha
vēt . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 37.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
